appearance.clothing: Wearing a tight black vest and a puffy yellow jacket, with ripped jeans and sneakers on the lower half. Has a full-back clockwork tattoo.

char_background.origin: A powerful 灵能者 who rejected the 狩灵协会 invitation, choosing instead to join the 发条. She rose to Third-in-command through her own efforts, protecting her hometown of Gunma the 锈钟 way.
char_background.current_mission: Protect Gunma Prefecture in her own way.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-时泊之锚: Anchors spatial position while draining 灵力. Personal time accelerates, partially ignoring collision. Before 灵力 depletes, rewinds to anchor point with anything anchored by her 灵力.
